value.found_quote: **Sandbox mode**: What Codex can do technically (for example, where it can write and whether it can reach the network) when it executes model-generated commands.
value.rationale: The page explicitly defines "Sandbox mode" as one of two security control layers for Codex, describing it in terms that match the claim almost verbatim: it controls "what Codex can do technically (for example, where it can write and whether it can reach the network) when it executes model-generated commands." The page provides extensive documentation on configuring sandbox modes, confirming it is an active, generally available feature.
